questions.question: What is the primary function of the Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU) in a computer?
options: B) To perform arithmetic and logical operations
C) To control the flow of data
questions.explanation: The ALU performs arithmetic and logical operations on data.

questions.question: Which component of a CPU is responsible for fetching instructions from memory?
questions.explanation: The Control Unit fetches instructions from memory.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Bus in a computer system?
options: B) To perform arithmetic and logical operations
C) To transfer data between components
questions.explanation: The Bus transfers data between components.

questions.question: Which type of memory is volatile, meaning its contents are lost when power is turned off?
What is the primary function of the Registers in a CPU?
options: B) To perform arithmetic and logical operations
C) To control the flow of data
questions.explanation: Registers store data temporarily while it is being processed.
